entry.title: art
entry.summary:
53
Objects and sprites have clear outlines to stand out. The colours of the background are softer to compliment the foreground. The background isn’t in focus and appears more painterly.
52 One way is to get rid of in-lines.
51 Drawing outlines can take a lot of precious space, so playing with dark and light tones instead might do the trick. Light is used to show important details, Dar...

entry.title: unity
jekyll
entry.summary:
3 facicon Real Favicon Generator
2 ruby gems mirror # 添加镜像源并移除默认源 gem sources --add https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/rubygems/ --remove https://rubygems.org/ # 列出已有源 gem sources -l # 应该只有镜像源一个
1 basic jekyll new blog jekyll server

entry.title: windows
entry.summary:
16 vscodevim ctrl + shift + p keybindings.json { "key": "capslock", "command": "extension.vim_escape" }
15 add gpedit.msc @echo off
pushd "%~dp0"
dir /b C:\Windows\servicing\Packages\Microsoft-Windows-GroupPolicy-ClientExtensions-Package~3*.mum >List.txt
dir /b C:\Windows\servicing\Packages\Microsoft-Windows-GroupPolicy-ClientTools-Package~3*.mum >>List.txt
for /f %%i...

entry.title: words
entry.summary: dither | saddle alas silhouette mitten ||||| trivial torso misinterpret tint dull cyan crab ||||| ramp | concave || convex cushion couch icing contour | chisel |||||| scenario |||||| plausible |||||| elaborate ||||| tribute ||||| tremendous ||||| sparse ||||| remedy ||||| paradigm ||||| impartial ||||| diagonal ||||| deficit ||||| benchmark ||||| analogy ||||| aggregate |||| tweak |||| trial...
